hooks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'Claudeが入力を待っています' -Sound Default"
powershell -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'タスクが完了しました' -Sound Default"
